final_prompt.prompt:
Design a PPT cover slide for the automotive brand launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a premium automotive reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be title-slide layout with space for headline and subheadline
Subject: must include "长安起源Q06" as the primary subject and "9月上市" as the launch timing
Scene/backdrop: needs a transparent and stunning visual atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an impactful and premium atmosphere — exact lighting approach is yours
Color palette: needs to align with brand tone — exact color direction is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must preserve all product name and launch date information
Avoid:
